---
title: "Shipments"
description: "Create and track locker-to-locker shipments via the Vendor API."
---

## Overview

Shipments are locker-to-locker parcel transfers. A shipment generates two PINs:
a **deposit PIN** (for the sender at the origin locker) and a **collection PIN**
(for the recipient at the destination locker). Both are sent via WhatsApp
automatically on creation.

All endpoints require `X-API-Key`.

## List shipments

`GET /api/vendor/v1/shipments`

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `status` | string | `pending_payment`, `paid`, `deposited`, `in_transit`, `at_destination`, `collected`, `cancelled` |
| `page` | integer | Default: 1 |
| `page_size` | integer | Default: 25 |

## Get shipment

`GET /api/vendor/v1/shipments/{id}`

## Bulk import via CSV

### Step 1 — Download the template

`GET /api/vendor/v1/shipments/csv-template`

Returns `urbnbox-shipments-template.csv`. No authentication required.

**Column order:**

| # | Column | Required | Notes |
|---|--------|----------|-------|
| 1 | `external_reference` | Yes | Your shipment ID — used for idempotency |
| 2 | `recipient_name` | Yes | Full name of recipient |
| 3 | `recipient_phone` | Yes | Kenyan number (`07xx` or `+254xx`) |
| 4 | `origin_city` | Yes | e.g. `Nairobi` |
| 5 | `destination_city` | Yes | e.g. `Mombasa` |
| 6 | `weight_tier` | Yes | `light`, `medium`, or `heavy` |

Example:
```csv
external_reference,recipient_name,recipient_phone,origin_city,destination_city,weight_tier
SHIP-001,Alice Mwangi,0712345678,Nairobi,Mombasa,light
SHIP-002,Bob Otieno,0798765432,Kisumu,Nairobi,medium
```

### Step 2 — Upload for validation

`POST /api/vendor/v1/shipments/import-csv`

Validates every row and returns per-row results. Does not create shipments
automatically — review errors, then re-upload or use
`/api/vendor/v1/shipments/bulk` to commit.

```json
{
  "valid_count": 23,
  "error_count": 1,
  "total_count": 24,
  "rows": [
    {
      "row": 1,
      "external_reference": "SHIP-001",
      "recipient_name": "Alice Mwangi",
      "recipient_phone": "0712345678",
      "origin_city": "Nairobi",
      "destination_city": "Mombasa",
      "weight_tier": "small"
    },
    {
      "row": 7,
      "external_reference": "SHIP-007",
      "error": "all fields required"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Weight tiers

| Tier | Max weight |
|------|-----------|
| `light` | up to 5 kg |
| `medium` | 5–15 kg |
| `heavy` | 15–30 kg |

## Shipment status flow

```
pending_payment → paid → deposited → in_transit → at_destination → collected
                                                                  ↘ cancelled
```

WhatsApp notifications are sent automatically at `paid` (deposit instructions
to sender) and at `at_destination` (collection instructions to recipient).
